rankings.why_it_matters: Mechanism story: Highlights import dependency for basic industrial components like fasteners, exposing a fragility in 'Make in India' and PLI schemes across electronics, auto, and durables.

rankings.title: ISM 2.0 to build on ‘pari passu’ model as India pushes for chip self-reliance
rankings.india_relevance: Explains the evolving policy and investment mechanism for India's high-stakes semiconductor manufacturing push.
rankings.why_it_matters: Details the 'how' of the next phase of India's chip scheme, crucial for understanding where public and private capital will flow in this strategic sector.

rankings.title: Heavy importer hedging, exporter reluctance weigh on rupee, data shows
rankings.india_relevance: Provides the 'why' behind rupee movements by analysing corporate FX hedging behaviour, not just flows.
rankings.why_it_matters: Explains a key domestic market dynamic: importers buying dollars forward for protection creates persistent pressure on INR, independent of FII flows.

rankings.title: Indian firms commit $20.5 billion investment in US; Pharma dominates with $19.1 billion
rankings.india_relevance: Captures a significant trend of outward FDI from India, concentrated in a strategic sector.
rankings.why_it_matters: Shows Indian pharma's strategic pivot to onshore production in key Western markets, driven by supply-chain and regulatory needs. A major capital allocation shift.

rankings.title: United Breweries flags  ₹400–500 crore cost hit as margins come under pressure
rankings.india_relevance: Highlights a specific structural cost pressure (likely commodities, logistics) impacting a major consumer goods firm.
rankings.why_it_matters: Not an earnings story, but a forward-looking cost warning. It's a signal for inflationary pressures in agri-inputs and packaging affecting the broader FMCG sector.

rankings.title: Cement sector faces margin pressure amid weak demand and rising costs
rankings.india_relevance: Analyses structural challenges in a core infrastructure sector, a bellwether for the construction economy.
rankings.why_it_matters: Explains the dual pressure of oversupply/weak demand and rising input costs, crucial for understanding capex cycle and pricing power in a key industry.

rankings.title: L&T's wings clipped by geopolitical tensions, recovery likely in H2 of FY27
rankings.india_relevance: Explanatory narrative on how global conflicts are impacting order flows and execution for India's largest engineering conglomerate.
rankings.why_it_matters: Provides a mechanism: delayed project sanctions in the Gulf and cost escalations are denting near-term growth, offering a read-through to the entire infrastructure sector.

rankings.title: Centre extends duty-free imports of yellow peas and black gram until March 2027 to curb rising pulse prices
rankings.india_relevance: Major trade policy decision with direct implications for food inflation and farmer incomes.
rankings.why_it_matters: Long-term extension signals continued reliance on imports to manage domestic pulse inflation, affecting pricing for farmers and consumers for two more years.

rankings.title: Reliance to set up data centre in Visakhapatnam at an investment of ₹1 lakh cr
rankings.india_relevance: Massive capital expenditure announcement in digital infrastructure, indicating a strategic push into a high-growth sector.
rankings.why_it_matters: A ₹1 lakh cr commitment signals Reliance's serious entry into the data center arms race, with implications for cloud competition, real estate, and energy demand.
